rendering: Seconds 0 through 10 past the minute, every 7 minutes, on the weekday nearest day 15 of the month

Every hour, on the last day of the month, and on Sunday, June through August

At 5 minutes past the hour, on the weekday nearest day 15 of the month, Monday through Friday, only in December

Every 15 minutes, starting at 5 minutes past the hour, every 2 hours, on day 1 of the month, Monday through Friday, June through August
At 30 minutes past the hour, every 2 hours, between 09:00 AM and 05:59 PM, on the weekday nearest day 15 of the month, on the second Monday of the month, only in January and July
